title: Inov8 Framing - Lime Oak A4 Inch (21x29.7cm) British Made Photo Frame - Wood Effect with Glass Picture Frame
features: British manufacturer with over 20 years experience in picture framing production
Precision machine cut and joined corners for highest quality finish and rigidity
21mm moulding complete with glass, hardboard backing and stand allowing both landscape and portrait positioning
Perfect fit for picture / photo size A4 Certificate. Actual Frame size slightly larger
Members of British Made for Quality supporting UK business and economy
description: From the manufacturer Inov8 Framing Company Supporting Local Businesses Consumers are increasingly interested in supporting British made products, as are we. That’s why Inov8 only uses UK supplied materials for their range of beautifully crafted frames. This supports our environment, industry and local economy. Inov8 are members of British Made for Quality. With 20 years’ experience in producing traditional photo frames our skilled team use precision machinery to ensure the highest quality finish. Corners are accurately mitred and double pinned for maximum stability. Each frame is inspected through our quality control department before being individually wrapped and boxed to ensure the frame arrives to you in perfect condition Strong Wall Hangers 2 hangers at the back of the frame allow you to hang your photos on the wall in either portrait or landscape Landscape or Portrait Frames are able to stand up as portrait or landscape Double Pinned All our frames corners are precision mitred and double pinned for maximum stability.
